summary: Added legion restart command for hot-reloading daemon without killing worker sessions. Key changes: cleanupStaleServes preserves healthy serves, shutdown accepts keepServe param, OpenCodeAdapter.adoptServe tracks existing serve PID, POST /restart endpoint, legion restart CLI command.
tests_added: cleanupStaleServes returns empty for unhealthy serve
shutdown with keepServe does not stop serve
adopts preserved serve PID from cleanupStaleServes
OpenCodeAdapter.adoptServe allows stop on adopted PID
